TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Alan_Arkin, title = Alan_Arkin, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alan_Arkin} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1934, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 3, Alan Arkin, squliq na Bunge'. pinqbaqan nya Alan Arkin, t'aring kawas tay 1951 tehuk kawas tay 1953, mqwas biru sa Los Angeles City pqwsan biru krahu. Alan Arkin uzi mqwas biru sa Bennington pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya Alan Arkin maki tay kawas 1955 msqun ki Jeremy Yaffe, maki tay kawas 1961 t'alax. maki 2 la'iy, Adam Arkin (1956-), Matthew Arkin (1960-). Alan Arkin maki tay kawas 1964 msqun ki Barbara Dana, maki tay kawas 1994 t'alax. maki 1 la'iy, Anthony Dana Arkin. Alan Arkin maki tay kawas 1996 msqun ki Suzanne Newlander, tehuk misuw qani. mintzyuwaw nya Alan Arkin hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1960, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. Alan Arkin hiya ga magan lalu nya. Alan Arkin hiya ga magan lalu nya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

kawas tay 1934, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 3, Alan Arkin, squliq na Bunge'. pinqbaqan nya Alan Arkin, t'aring kawas tay 1951 tehuk kawas tay 1953, mqwas biru sa Los Angeles City pqwsan biru krahu. Alan Arkin uzi mqwas biru sa Bennington pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya Alan Arkin maki tay kawas 1955 msqun ki Jeremy Yaffe, maki tay kawas 1961 t'alax. maki 2 la'iy, Adam Arkin (1956-), Matthew Arkin (1960-). Alan Arkin maki tay kawas 1964 msqun ki Barbara Dana, maki tay kawas 1994 t'alax. maki 1 la'iy, Anthony Dana Arkin. Alan Arkin maki tay kawas 1996 msqun ki Suzanne Newlander, tehuk misuw qani. mintzyuwaw nya Alan Arkin hiya ga m'engi. t'aring sa kawas 1960, mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na engi ru mqwas. Alan Arkin hiya ga magan lalu nya. Alan Arkin hiya ga magan lalu nya. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, alan arkin, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. pinqβaqan nja alan arkin, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa los~ɕ aŋeles~ɕ ʦ~ʨitj pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. alan arkin uzi mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa βenniŋton pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. qnxan nja alan arkin maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki *eremj ja**e, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. maki * laʔij, a*am arkin (****-), mattħew arkin (****-). alan arkin maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki βarβara *ana, maki taj kawas~ɕ **** tʔalax. maki * laʔij, antħonj *ana arkin. alan arkin maki taj kawas~ɕ **** ms~ɕqun ki s~ɕuzanne newlan*er, teħuk mis~ɕuw qani. mintzjuwaw nja alan arkin ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. tʔariŋ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na eŋi ru mqwas~ɕ. alan arkin ħija ɣa maɣan lalu nja. alan arkin ħija ɣa maɣan lalu nja. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
